rawCards.name: Harlow 1st Reaction Force
rawLines: The strong right arm of The
ECROF NOITCAER TS1 WOLRAH ECROF NOITCAER TS1 WOLRAH ECROF NOITCAER TS1 WOLRAH
PRINT ALONG THE LONG EDGE DOUBLE SIDED | CUT ALONG CROP MARKS
Assaulters: Models in this Unit cannot be Targeted by
Chaff: Place a Smoke Token (Chaff) within 6” of a Model in this Unit
before Activating. Chaff Smoke Tokens Dissipate on a 10+.
Stims: Models in this Unit gain +2 Movement for their Activation.
Harlow First Reaction Force Units gain +2 Movement
| HARLOW SPRINGBOK AI |     |         | HARLOW CONTROL TEAM                   |     |         | HARLOW ASSAULT TEAM |     |         |
| Chaff Discharge     |     |         | One Unit may be Activated after this  |     |         |                     |     |         |
Mark a box to prevent a single  Unit without spending a Control Point. SPECIALIST 1: Machine Gunner
AI, Jump(4) SPECIALIST 2: Grenade Launcher When this Model gains a Ready Token
|     |                  |     | GRENADE LAUNCHER | 24”/2  |                  |     | it may give it to a Model in this Unit  |                  |     |
|     |                  |     | Blast (1)                 |                  |     | that has already made an Action.        |                  |     |
|     | SCAN TO CHECK    |     |                           | SCAN TO CHECK    |     |                                         | SCAN TO CHECK    |     |
|     | FOR UNIT UPDATES |     |                           | FOR UNIT UPDATES |     |                                         | FOR UNIT UPDATES |     |
rawCards.notes: OCR retained for audit only. All curated force fields verified against screenshots side1 and side2.
